title: Amtech G1650 400mm (16") Cement finishing trowel with soft grip
features: DURABLE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: This 400mm (16") cement finishing float trowel has a hardened and tempered steel blade with a soft grip for added comfort and ease of use
STEEL BODY: Durable construction provides strength for long-term performance
SIZE CAPACITY: 16 inch / 400 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning Always follow safety guidelines when using digging tools. Wear appropriate protective gear, including eye protection, and be aware of your surroundings to avoid contact with underground utilities. Box Contains 1x Trowel See more
